---
title: "Cronograma de aulas"
---

::: titulo-nao-numerado
Cronograma de aulas (em constante atualização)
:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(googlesheets4)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(lubridate)

gs4_deauth()

url <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1C8iaK5cIXu5h20At5pnALHRMY-g716--GfRJEfmHf3M/edit"
cronograma <- read_sheet(url, sheet = "cronograma_anete") |>
  mutate(Data = format(as.Date(Data), "%d/%m/%Y"))

kable(
  cronograma,
  caption = "Cronograma de encontros da disciplina",
  align = "clll"
) |>
  kable_styling(
    full_width = TRUE,
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive"),
    position = "center",
    htmltable_class = "cronograma-fixo"
  ) |>
  column_spec(1, width = "7em",  bold = TRUE) |>
  column_spec(2, width = "22em") |>
  column_spec(3, width = "20em") |>
  column_spec(4, width = "28em") |>
  row_spec(
    0,
    extra_css = "white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: anywhere; word-break: break-word;"
  ) |>
  row_spec(
    1:nrow(cronograma),
    extra_css = "white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: anywhere; word-break: break-word; vertical-align: top;"
  ) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    latex_options = NULL,
    font_size = 13
  )
```
